name: Drake
why: ICEMAN debuted at No. 1 on the Billboard 200 with 463,000 equivalent album units, the biggest streaming week for a hip-hop album in 2026, and held the top spot for three consecutive weeks as of June 8, 2026
signal: Billboard 200 No. 1 three consecutive weeks June 2026

name: Myles Smith
why: Debut studio album My Mess, My Heart, My Life releases June 19, 2026 on Island Records, following his global streaming breakthrough with Stargazing in 2025 that drove him onto international charts

name: Fuerza Regida
why: 111XPANTIA debuted at No. 2 on the Billboard 200 in early 2026, the highest-charting Spanish-language album by a duo or group ever, and the trio headlined Rolling Stone's SXSW Future of Music showcase in March 2026
signal: Billboard 200 No. 2 debut, Rolling Stone SXSW 2026

name: Lola Young
why: UK singer-songwriter headlined Night 1 of Rolling Stone's SXSW Future of Music showcase in March 2026, with her breakout single Messy accumulating global streams and positioning her as one of Britain's most-watched new voices
signal: Rolling Stone SXSW Future of Music March 2026

name: BigXthaPlug
why: Dallas rapper headlined the closing night of Rolling Stone's SXSW Future of Music showcase in March 2026, with Texas crossing into national streaming territory and charting on the Billboard Hot 100
signal: Rolling Stone SXSW Future of Music March 2026

name: Laufey
why: Icelandic-Chinese jazz-pop artist surpassed 22 million Spotify monthly listeners entering June 2026, with her genre-blending sound dominating streaming playlists and crossing into mainstream global audiences

name: Ella Langley
why: Collaboration with Morgan Wallen placed in the Billboard Hot 100 top 10 the week of June 13, 2026, cementing her as one of the fastest-rising country-pop crossover artists of the year
signal: Billboard Hot 100 top 10, week of June 13, 2026

name: Bruno Mars
why: Ranked as the most-streamed artist globally on Spotify entering June 2026, sustaining multi-year dominance with live residencies and new collaborations that keep him at the center of mainstream pop
signal: Most-streamed artist globally on Spotify June 2026

name: Central Cee
why: London rapper entered June 2026 as the biggest UK rap artist in the world, with crossover streaming hits charting simultaneously in the US, UK, and across Europe and over 5 million Instagram followers
signal: Biggest UK rap artist 2026, 5M plus Instagram followers

name: Maya Seas
why: Featured in Artsy's 5 Artists on Our Radar in June 2026, working in oil stick, acrylic, charcoal, and 24-karat gold to create large-scale paintings that explore emotional safety and intimacy through layered material depth
signal: Artsy Artist on Our Radar June 2026

name: Shuang Li
why: Solo exhibition at Kunsthalle Basel in June 2026, named among ArtReview's 14 exhibitions to see this month for her practice merging performance, text, and conceptual work across language and media
signal: Kunsthalle Basel solo show, ArtReview June 2026 pick

name: Julio Le Parc
why: Landmark retrospective Light Colour Action opened at Tate Modern on June 11, 2026, presenting over 60 works across a 70-year career. The Argentine kinetic art pioneer passed away in May 2026 at 97, making the exhibition a historic tribute

name: Ayo Edebiri
why: Won the Emmy Award for Outstanding Lead Actress in a Comedy Series for The Bear in 2025 and entered 2026 as one of the most sought-after actors in Hollywood, anchoring major film projects while the show enters its fourth season

name: Beyonce
why: Cowboy Carter led nominations at the 67th Grammy Awards in February 2026, and her genre-crossing record continues to fuel cultural debate around American identity, country music, and Black artistry heading into summer 2026

name: Pedro Pascal
why: The Last of Us Season 2 on HBO premiered in April 2025 to record-setting streaming numbers for the network, and his cultural footprint has grown further as Season 3 enters production in 2026
signal: The Last of Us Season 2 HBO record streaming 2025
